queries.question: Show me the names of the students and possible industries and job roles where they could work.
queries.sql:
select s.fullname, c.JobRole, Industry
from students as s
join enrollments as e
on s.studentid=e.studentid
join courses as c
on e.courseid=c.courseid
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?jobrole ?industry WHERE {
  ?s a :Students .
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?e p:hasStudents ?s .
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?e p:hasCourses ?c .
  ?s p:name ?fullname .
  ?c p:JobRole ?jobrole .
  ?c p:Industry ?industry .
}

queries.question: Which course has the oldest student and what industry could this open up?
queries.sql:
select c.title, c.Industry
from students as s
join enrollments as e
on s.studentid=e.studentid
join courses as c
on e.courseid=c.courseid
order by s.birthdate asc limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?industry WHERE {
  ?s a :Students .
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?e p:hasStudents ?s .
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?e p:hasCourses ?c .
  ?c p:Title ?title .
  ?c p:Industry ?industry .
  ?s p:BirthDate ?birthdate_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?birthdate_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the names of the students and their career options.
Which course has the oldest student chosen and what career opportunities could this open up?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?title ?industry WHERE {
  ?s a :Students .
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?e p:hasStudents ?s .
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?e p:hasCourses ?c .
  ?c p:Title ?title .
  ?c p:Industry ?industry .
  ?s p:BirthDate ?birthdate_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?birthdate_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?title ?jobrole WHERE {
  ?s a :Students .
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?e p:hasStudents ?s .
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?e p:hasCourses ?c .
  ?c p:Title ?title .
  ?c p:JobRole ?jobrole .
  ?s p:BirthDate ?birthdate_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?birthdate_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  full: { SELECT ?title ?jobrole ?industry WHERE {
  ?s a :Students .
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?e p:hasStudents ?s .
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?e p:hasCourses ?c .
  ?c p:Title ?title .
  ?c p:JobRole ?jobrole .
  ?c p:Industry ?industry .
  ?s p:BirthDate ?birthdate_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?birthdate_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
